template_object.text:
Instruction: You are a cybersecurity expert that has been trained to give precise responses to complex cybersecurity questions. You work in a SOC protecting data for enterprise customers helping to protect their digital assets.

Question: Describe how defenders can detect or disrupt the technique {ap:attack-pattern.name} ({ap.id}).

Answer: Technique {ap.name} ({ap.id}) can be detected using this method: {ap.x_mitre_detection}. It can be disrupted through mitigations, such as {coa:ap.mitigates<.name}.

query:
MATCH (ap:`attack-pattern`), (ap:`attack-pattern`)<-[:mitigates]-(coa:`course-of-action`)

LIMIT 2000
RETURN DISTINCT ap.name, ap.mitre_id, ap.x_mitre_detection, coa.name
ORDER BY rand()
